name: Design change

> **Heads up:** the tokens in `design-system/colors_and_type.css` are LOCKED. Changes here require approval from the project lead and a corresponding update to `docs/DESIGN-BRIEF.md` and `design-system/README.md`.

## Proposed change

<!-- What in the design system / brand do you want to change? Be specific: token name, component, voice rule. -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why? What evidence or constraint drives this? Link to research, accessibility report, brand alignment, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you consider? Why did this option win? -->

## Scope of impact

<!-- Which surfaces / components / artifacts are affected? -->

- [ ] Color tokens
- [ ] Type tokens (family, scale, line-height, tracking)
- [ ] Spacing / layout tokens
- [ ] Radii / shadows / motion
- [ ] Component pattern (button, card, nav, etc.)
- [ ] Voice / copy rule
- [ ] Anti-defaults / banlist
- [ ] Brand asset (logo, mark, wordmark)

## Backward compatibility

<!-- Will this break anything that currently exists? If yes, list each affected file / component. -->

## Approval needed

- [ ] Project lead
- [ ] RSA Tech leadership (only if brand-facing or trademark-adjacent)
- [ ] Legal (only if logo / mark changes)

## References

<!-- Brand brief sections, accessibility audit, competitor reference, anything supporting the change. -->
